```{r taxonomy}
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Chalcodryidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Ciidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Ischaliidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Melandryidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Meloidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Mordellidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Mycetophagidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Mycteridae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Oedemeridae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Promecheilidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Pterogeniidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Pyrochroidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Pythidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Ripiphoridae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Salpingidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Scraptiidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Stenotrachelidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Synchroidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Tenebrionidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Tetratomidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Trictenotomidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Ulodidae",
  "Polyphaga", "Tenebrionoidea", "Zopheridae",
  
  # Polyphaga incertae sedis
  "Polyphaga", "incertae sedis", "Jurodidae"
)

# Add flower visitor information
flower_visitors <- c("Agyrtidae", "Anthicidae", "Anthribidae", "Attelabidae", "Belidae", "Biphyllidae", "Boganiidae", "Bostrichidae", "Byrrhidae", "Brentidae", "Byturidae", "Buprestidae", "Cantharidae", "Carabidae", "Cerambycidae", "Chrysomelidae", "Cicindelidae", "Cleridae", "Coccinellidae", "Corylophidae", "Cryptophagidae", "Cucujidae", "Curculionidae", "Dascillidae", "Dermestidae", "Dytiscidae", "Elateridae", "Erotylidae", "Eucnemidae", "Geotrupidae", "Glaphyridae", "Histeridae", "Hydrophilidae", "Hybosoridae", "Kateretidae", "Laemophloeidae", "Lampyridae", "Latridiidae", "Leiodidae", "Lymexylidae", "Lucanidae", "Lycidae", "Megalopodidae", "Meloidae", "Melyridae", "Monotomidae", "Mordellidae", "Mycetophagidae", "Mycteridae", "Nemonychidae", "Nitidulidae", "Oedemeridae", "Orsodacnidae", "Phalacridae", "Ptinidae", "Ptiliidae", "Pyrochroidae", "Ripiphoridae", "Salpingidae", "Scarabaeidae", "Scraptiidae", "Scirtidae", "Silvanidae", "Sphaeroceridae", "Staphylinidae", "Stenotrachelidae", "Tenebrionidae", "Throscidae", "Trogossitidae", "Zopheridae")

pollinator_families <- c("Anthicidae", "Anthribidae", "Attelabidae", "Belidae", "Biphyllidae", "Boganiidae", "Brentidae", "Byturidae", "Buprestidae", "Cantharidae", "Carabidae", "Cerambycidae", "Chrysomelidae", "Cleridae", "Coccinellidae", "Corylophidae", "Cryptophagidae", "Curculionidae", "Dermestidae", "Elateridae", "Erotylidae", "Geotrupidae", "Glaphyridae", "Hybosoridae", "Hydrophilidae", "Kateretidae", "Lampyridae", "Latridiidae", "Lymexylidae", "Lucanidae", "Lycidae", "Meloidae", "Melyridae", "Monotomidae", "Mordellidae", "Mycetophagidae", "Nitidulidae", "Oedemeridae", "Ptinidae", "Ptiliidae", "Pyrochroidae", "Scarabaeidae", "Scraptiidae", "Scirtidae", "Silvanidae", "Sphaeroceridae", "Staphylinidae", "Stenotrachelidae", "Tenebrionidae", "Throscidae")

beetle_taxonomy$flower_visitor <- beetle_taxonomy$Family %in% flower_visitors
beetle_taxonomy$pollinator <- beetle_taxonomy$Family %in% pollinator_families
```

## Process Phylogenetic Tree

Next, we'll load and process the phylogenetic tree, removing outgroups and simplifying monophyletic groups.

```{r tree_processing}
# Read tree and remove outgroups
tree <- read.nexus("Cai_et_al_phylo/FigTree.tre")
outgroups <- c("Corydalidae", "Chrysopidae", "Myrmeleontidae", "Ascalaphidae")
tips_to_keep <- tree$tip.label[!grepl(paste(outgroups, collapse="|"), tree$tip.label)]
tree <- keep.tip(tree, tips_to_keep)
```

Update Silphidae and Cybocephalidae status
```{r}
tree$tip.label = str_replace(tree$tip.label, "Silphidae", "Staphylinidae") %>%
  str_replace("Cybocephalidae", "Nitidulidae")
```


Collapse monophyletic family-name groups
```{r}
while(TRUE) {
  changes_made <- FALSE
  N <- Ntip(tree)
  internal_nodes <- (N + 1):(N + tree$Nnode)
  
  for(node in internal_nodes) {
    descendants <- extract.clade(tree, node)$tip.label
    families <- unique(gsub("_.*$", "", descendants))
    
    if(length(families) == 1 && length(descendants) > 1) {
      # Keep first tip, drop others
      tips_to_drop <- descendants[-1]
      tree <- drop.tip(tree, tips_to_drop)
      changes_made <- TRUE
      break  # Break the for loop as node numbers have changed
    }
  }
  
  if(!changes_made) break  # No more changes needed, exit while loop
}
```

Rename tips
```{r}
# First ladderize the tree
tree <- ladderize(tree)

# Get family names
families <- gsub("_.*$", "", tree$tip.label)

# Create new labels
new_labels <- character(length(tree$tip.label))
family_counts <- table(families)

# For each unique family
for(family in unique(families)) {
  # If family appears only once, use simple name
  if(family_counts[family] == 1) {
    new_labels[families == family] <- family
  } else {
    # If family appears multiple times, add numbering
    new_labels[families == family] <- paste(family, 1:family_counts[family])
  }
}

# Replace tip labels
tree$tip.label <- new_labels
```


## Find Taxonomic Nodes

First,we will update our taxonomic dataframe to relate families to tip labels. 
```{r}
# Get the tip labels and their corresponding families
tip_data <- tibble(
  node = 1:Ntip(tree),
  tip_label = tree$tip.label,
  Family = gsub(" \\d+$", "", tree$tip.label)  # Remove numbering from family names
) %>%
  # Add flower visitor information
  mutate(is_flower_visitor = Family %in% unique(
    beetle_taxonomy$Family[beetle_taxonomy$flower_visitor]
  ),
  is_pollinator = Family %in% unique(
    beetle_taxonomy$Family[beetle_taxonomy$pollinator]
  ),
  beetle_status = case_when(
   is_pollinator == TRUE ~ "pollinator",
   is_flower_visitor == TRUE ~ "flower visitor",
   TRUE ~ NA
 ))

# Function to find tip labels for a family
get_tip_labels <- function(family, tip_data) {
  matches <- tip_data$tip_label[tip_data$Family == family]
  if(length(matches) == 0) return(NA)
  return(matches)
}

# Create new data frame with duplicated rows for multiple tips
new_beetle_taxonomy <- do.call(rbind, lapply(1:nrow(beetle_taxonomy), function(i) {
  family <- beetle_taxonomy$Family[i]
  tip_labels <- get_tip_labels(family, tip_data)
  
  if(length(tip_labels) == 1 && is.na(tip_labels)) {
    # Family not in tree
    return(cbind(beetle_taxonomy[i,], tip_label = NA))
  } else {
    # Create one row per tip label
    return(do.call(rbind, lapply(tip_labels, function(tip) {
      cbind(beetle_taxonomy[i,], tip_label = tip)
    })))
  }
}))

# Convert back to tibble if needed
beetle_taxonomy <- as_tibble(new_beetle_taxonomy)
```

These are the flower visitor families missing from the tree:
```{r}
beetle_taxonomy %>% filter(flower_visitor, is.na(tip_label))
```


Now we'll identify the nodes corresponding to suborders and superfamilies.

## Create Visualization

Finally, we'll create the visualization with colored branches and taxonomic labels.
```{r}
# First rescale the tree to geological time
tree$edge.length <- tree$edge.length * 100  # Multiply by 100 to get ~300 MY depth
```


```{r plot_tree, fig.width=12, fig.height=16}
# Create base plot
p <- ggtree(tree) + 
  # Add gray branches
  geom_tree(size = 0.1, color = "gray20") +
  # Add points for flower visitors
  geom_point(
    data = . %>% filter(isTip & tip_data$is_flower_visitor[node] &!tip_data$is_pollinator[node]), 
    aes(x = x, y = y),
    color = "goldenrod",
    size = 1
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = . %>% filter(isTip & tip_data$is_pollinator[node]), 
    aes(x = x, y = y),
    color = "brown1",
    size = 1
  ) 

# First get the superfamily ranges
superfamily_ranges <- p$data %>% 
  filter(isTip) %>% 
  left_join(beetle_taxonomy, by = c('label'='tip_label')) %>% 
  group_by(Superfamily) %>% 
  summarise(min_y = min(y), max_y = max(y)) %>% 
  mutate(min_y = min_y - 0.4, max_y = max_y + 0.4) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Superfamily))

# Create color palette for superfamilies
superfamily_colors <- setNames(
  scales::hue_pal()(length(unique(beetle_taxonomy$Superfamily))),
  unique(beetle_taxonomy$Superfamily)
)

# Create base plot
p <- p + 
  # Add rectangles for each superfamily
  geom_rect(
    data = superfamily_ranges,
    aes(
      ymin = min_y,
      ymax = max_y,
      xmin = 10,
      xmax = 80,
      fill = Superfamily
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  # Add superfamily labels inside rectangles
  geom_text(
    data = superfamily_ranges,
    aes(
      x = 45,  # Center of rectangle
      y = (min_y + max_y)/2,  # Center of rectangle
      label = Superfamily
    ),
    color = 'black',
    size = 1.5,
    hjust = 0.5,
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = superfamily_colors, guide = 'none') +
  scale_color_manual(values = superfamily_colors, guide = 'none') +
  coord_geo(
    dat = "periods",
    pos = "bottom", 
    xlim = c(-330,100),
    ylim = c(0,142),
    neg = TRUE,
    height = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    size = 3,
    center_end_labels = TRUE
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
  breaks = seq(-300, 0, by = 50),
  labels = abs(seq(300, 0, by = -50)),
  
) +
  theme_tree2()

revts(p)

ggsave(filename = 'figures/Coleop_tree.pdf', device = 'pdf', useDingbats=F, height = 180, width = 100, units = 'mm' )
```


# Session Info

```{r session_info}
sessionInfo()
```
